violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biol-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and ice was disposed of. Other ice machine to be used until ice machine is washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
An employee was observed using a cup as a scoop. Scoop was added to ice bin to be used. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400ppm. PIC stated service order will be placed. Until dispenser/tubing is repaired, staff must manually fill up 3-bay sink and test to be appropriate ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
